summary: Retest of TripMatch calendar narrow-viewport rule after isNarrow threshold was raised from 760 to 900 in TripMatcher.jsx. All three required viewport rules PASS.

viewport_retest_results.notes: No rdp-multiple_months class; single table renders. Left>=0 and right<=innerWidth.
rdp-multiple_months class present; two tables (June+July) side by side.
Single month, popover hugs left edge but does not overflow.

test_note_on_selectors: Project uses react-day-picker v8 — month caption class is NOT '.rdp-month_caption' (that is v9). Months counted by querying tables inside [data-radix-popper-content-wrapper] and confirming presence/absence of the 'rdp-multiple_months' class.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The calendar overflow fix (isNarrow threshold = 900 in /app/frontend/src/components/site/TripMatcher.jsx) is verified working at 820x900 (1 month), 1440x900 (2 months), and 390x844 (1 month). If counting months in future tests, use table count inside [data-radix-popper-content-wrapper] OR detect the 'rdp-multiple_months' class — not '.rdp-month_caption' (v9 class, not present in this v8 setup).
